purpose: Control pass to confirm the direct-stage probe harness itself can boot the levels that fail in the current 480i candidate.

method.note: The first contact-sheet tile can show the previously loaded probe because capture starts before Kasa power-cycle.

results.result: Stock TND direct Party boots through the blue rectangle into the CMGN Launch Party title card, intro scene, and live/rendered stage view.
Stock TND direct Hotel boots and renders normally, without the 480i prism/blown-out corruption.
Stock TND direct City boots through the Saigon Streets title card into intro/live rendering. The direct-stage harness is not the reason City is black on tnd58.
Stock TND direct Volcano boots and renders normally, including effects/explosion frames, without the 480i prism corruption.
Stock TND direct The End boots through the City of Hamburg title card into intro/live rendering. The direct-stage harness is not the reason The End is black on tnd58.

conclusion: The direct-stage probe harness is valid for Party, Hotel, City, Volcano, and The End on stock TND64.
The tnd58 failures are introduced by the 480i patch stack rather than by direct-stage booting.

Because stock direct probes show title cards/intro/live render where tnd58 direct probes show black or prism corruption, the next investigation should compare stock vs tnd58 camera/transition/render-state code paths, not level data or save state.

restore.sc64_state_after_restore: Direct ROM mode, EEPROM 4k; upload succeeded after the stock-control pass.
